item.title: Immunovant IMVT-1402 (batoclimab)
item.description:
• Summary: Immunovant's FcRn inhibitor IMVT-1402 (batoclimab) has failed to meet primary endpoints in two Phase 3 trials for thyroid eye disease. This setback impacts the development of this drug for autoimmune conditions affecting the eyes, highlighting challenges in targeting this indication.
  • MoAs: Batoclimab is an FcRn (neonatal Fc receptor) inhibitor that reduces circulating IgG levels by blocking FcRn-mediated IgG recycling, thereby mitigating autoimmune responses.
  • Sources: Endpoints News
